title: A10-Derived H0 Scaffold Failure-Boundary Audit v0.1.1: How a Hubble-Tension Scaffold Failed Safely
description: Claim-bounded failure-boundary audit and public repository refresh of an A10-derived Hubble-tension scaffold. The archive records where the scaffold stopped: candidate proxy/handoff material survived, but no first-principles physical E(z)/H(z) bridge was established. Therefore no real-data likelihood, Lambda-CDM comparison, MCMC posterior, evidence metric, Hubble-tension solution, or Lambda-CDM replacement claim is made. Version v0.1.1 refreshes public landing pages, metadata, manifests, and discoverability without introducing new cosmological claims.
notes: This record archives a claim-bounded failure-localization package, not a solved cosmological model or peer-reviewed observational result. Do not use a manually entered Zenodo-managed DOI. If archived through GitHub, let Zenodo create the repository archive identifier from a GitHub release.
